title: Bridge Essay: Introduction to Gestural Similarity in Music. An Application of Category Theory to the Orchestra

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social cognition, intersubjectivity, gestural communication.
**Introduction to Gestural Similarity in Music. An Application of Category Theory to the Orchestra** -  (None). DOI: . PMID: .
